purpose: Live-verify the TravelPriceObservation writer (previously zero call sites repo-wide) and the rollup->benchmark path, including the origin_city vs destination_city bug fix the implementation report describes.

step_1_baseline.grep_confirmation: TravelPriceObservation.objects.create had zero call sites repo-wide before this phase (confirmed by grep, per implementation report).

step_2_writer_call.note: mock provider path — LIVE_PROVIDERS_ENABLED is off in this dev environment, same as the original verification
step_2_writer_call.interpretation: 0 -> 2 real rows, city correctly resolved to New Delhi via the origin param.

step_3_rollup.output: 2 observations -> 1 groups (created=1 updated=0, 0 skipped: no resolved city)

step_4_bug_fix_confirmation.bug: estimate_cab()'s benchmark lookup originally queried TravelPriceSummary.destination_city, but cab observations resolve their city FK to the origin (pickup city) per _resolve_observation_fk's cab branch — so a real seeded cab summary was silently never found.
step_4_bug_fix_confirmation.interpretation: method=='benchmark' confirms the fixed query correctly finds the origin_city-keyed summary row instead of falling through to the FareRule rung.
